item.him.guardian_phone.follow_cancelled: Him will no longer follow and protect you.
item.him.guardian_phone.no_follow_to_can: Him isn't following you right now.
item.him.guardian_phone.failed: Him did not answer your summon.
item.him.guardian_phone.tooltip.use: Right-click to open the Demon King's Summoning Device.

screen.him.guardian_phone.title: Demon King's Summoning Device
screen.him.guardian_phone.subtitle: Left-click to choose Him's guard mode
screen.him.guardian_phone.follow.desc: Him stays by your side and keeps watch over you.
screen.him.guardian_phone.timed_follow.d: Him guards you for 2 minutes, then leaves.
Have Him stop following you immediately.
